summary: Ground 0 WAIT/NO-GO email capture form testing. All backend APIs and frontend UI elements pass. Both WAIT and NO-GO completion screens work correctly with email capture forms, success states, and MailerLite integration. GO screen is unchanged with no email capture. g0-restart-btn works correctly.
seed_data_creation: Used waitcapture@example.com (WAIT) and nogocapture@example.com (NO-GO) for form submissions
context_for_next_testing_agent: testoperator@example.com (password: test123) works for testing. Use /api/ground0/progress POST to set decision to WAIT/NO-GO/GO before testing completion screens in the portal. Session token approach: login via /api/auth/login, get session token from cookie, inject via page.context.add_cookies. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_waitlist.py covers all waitlist endpoint edge cases.

frontend: WAIT screen: 'YOU ARE NOT READY — YET' headline ✓
WAIT screen: subline 'The gaps identified in Ground 0 must be corrected before admission' ✓
WAIT form: g0-wait-submit-btn text 'RESERVE ADMISSION PRIORITY →' ✓
WAIT form: submission shows g0-wait-success '✓ ADMISSION PRIORITY RESERVED' ✓
WAIT form: form hidden after success ✓
WAIT section: 'BEGIN CLOSING GAPS NOW' present ✓
WAIT section: g0-doc-bundle-cta href=/compliance-library, text 'VIEW THE DOCUMENT SYSTEM' ✓
NO-GO screen: 'THIS STANDARD DOES NOT APPLY TO YOUR CURRENT POSITION' headline ✓
NO-GO form: g0-nogo-submit-btn text 'REGISTER FOR FUTURE ELIGIBILITY →' ✓
NO-GO form: submission shows g0-nogo-success '✓ ELIGIBILITY REGISTRATION CONFIRMED' ✓
NO-GO form: form hidden after success ✓
GO screen: no WAIT/NO-GO capture forms present ✓
GO screen: 'You've called GO.' headline present ✓
